architecture.name: GGPK-backed POE2 data extractor
architecture.style: layered pipeline with raw archive, normalized domain, relationship graph, and diff outputs

layers.name: upstream_adapter
layers.responsibility: Use PoB-PoE2 Lua/exporter code to read GGPK/DAT data and generate reference outputs.

layers.name: rust_core
layers.responsibility: Fingerprint, hash, stream import, copy referenced assets, run diffs, and later parse DAT natively.

layers.name: raw_store
layers.responsibility: Store table specs, columns, rows, row hashes, and source metadata exactly enough to compare patches.

layers.name: domain_store
layers.responsibility: Store app-usable items, skills, mods, stats, passives, and assets as granular versioned tables.

layers.name: relationship_graph
layers.responsibility: Store entity-to-entity and entity-to-asset links for search, tooltips, planner data, and future PoB web.

layers.name: export_layer
layers.responsibility: Generate compact JSON/JS payloads consumed by the current app or future planner.

boundary_rules: The current app may consume extractor exports, but must not import extractor internals.
The extractor may share DB connection helpers only if it does not alter existing content tables.
All local game paths are config inputs, never frontend-visible requirements.
